creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Mon May 19 07:15:37 2014
New Revision: 354500
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/354500
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r354500/

Log:
  - Update to 1.2.7
  - Pet portlint
  
  PR:		189798
  Submitted by:	Bartek Rutkowski <ports@robakdesign.com>

Deleted:
  head/net/pecl-radius/files/
Modified:
  head/net/pecl-radius/Makefile
  head/net/pecl-radius/distinfo
  head/net/pecl-radius/pkg-descr

Modified: head/net/pecl-radius/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/pecl-radius/Makefile	Mon May 19 07:14:52 2014	(r354499)
+++ head/net/pecl-radius/Makefile	Mon May 19 07:15:37 2014	(r354500)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	radius
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.5
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.7
 CATEGORIES=	net security pear
 MASTER_SITES=	http://pecl.php.net/get/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	pecl-

==============================================================================

+++ head/net/pecl-radius/pkg-descr	Mon May 19 07:15:37 2014	(r354500)

 authenticate your users against the user-database of your OS (for example
 against Windows Active-Directory via IAS).
 
-WWW: http://pecl.php.net/package/radius/
+WWW: http://pecl.php.net/package/radius
